creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
Created attachment 238730
Update patch as described

Updates to 3.3.13.

portlint OK
port test OK
port test -L OK for postfixadmin33-lite subport

Summary of changes:

- psalm and phpcs formatting fixes
- Update smarty (4.3.0), including a smarty security fix
- fixes for PHP 8.1
- fixes #541, #632, #687, #690

See the following release announcements for further details:

https://github.com/postfixadmin/postfixadmin/releases/tag/postfixadmin-3.3.12
https://github.com/postfixadmin/postfixadmin/releases/tag/postfixadmin-3.3.13
